_source: n15g/coh-content-db-homecoming (Unlicense). Master/iTrial challenge badges + their required sub-badges.
_join: keyed by normalised task-force / trial name; the client matches it to an event it already lists on the road.
_note: These badges are earned by COMPLETING a TF/trial under challenge conditions, not at a location — hence attached to the run, not a zone.

airwaves.text: Top of the world! You have climbed to the top of the radio tower in Grandville.

science.text: Dr. Aeon designed this giant globe of an atom to signify the advances that science has brought to Cap au Diable.
